response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced, versatile engineer with a genuine open-source and Linux pedigree (GISCollective founder, D-language libraries, FOSS4G speaker) and strong knowledge-sharing instincts. However, this is an executive-level, client-facing leadership role at a German consulting firm requiring minimum C1 German, and his German is listed as basic — a hard disqualifier for advising German clients. He also lacks demonstrated formal team-leadership or technical project-management experience, and shows no evidence of UML/modeling, requirements management, Python, or IT security and compliance work that the role centers on.
strengths: Nearly two decades of hands-on development across web, mobile, embedded, and high-performance backend systems
Authentic open-source commitment: founded GISCollective, maintains D-language libraries, speaks at FOSS4G
Proven mentor and educator through workshops, multi-module courses, and code kata sessions
concerns: German listed as basic, far below the required C1 minimum for a client-advisory role
No formal experience leading teams or managing projects at the required executive level
No demonstrated UML/modeling, requirements management, Python, or IT security/compliance background

key_factors.factor: Depth and breadth of open-source/Linux engineering experience
Lack of formal leadership and architecture-governance track record
